title: The Commander of the Faithful Dismounts at Dhu Qar
description: at Dhu Qdr According to al-Sari (in writing)-Shu'ayb-Sayf-'Amr-alSha'bi: When they congregated at Dhu Qar `Ali received them with a group, which included Ibn `Abbas. He then welcomed them. "Men of al-Kufah!" he said. "It was you who repelled the power of the Sasanians and their kings. You scattered their troops, and their inheritances fell to you. You enriched640 your territory 635. A milder form of la aba Zak! 636. I.e., you can cut it off if I'm lying. 637. Cf. p. 89, above. 638. Munafigin; see EI2, s.v. 639. I.e., that is sufficient. 640.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 16
